parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-2 performance-lookup parity — improving branch + seeded issueScores + boost/taper moduleDose. Three completed pull-a / seated-row sessions, most-recent-first: latest 70x8 (value 560) vs the two prior 50x8 (value 400, baseline 400). latest > baseline*1.05 and no pain => improvingIssues gets the seated-row issues (thoracic_rotation/scapular_control). The screening seed pre-loads issueScores {core_control:4, scapular_control:3}: moduleDose => core_control boost (seed >=4), scapular_control taper (seeded 3 < 4 but improving), thoracic_rotation taper (improving). Proves the screening.adaptiveState.issueScores seed is merged (the ONLY screening field buildAdaptiveState reads). FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (pull-a / seated-row). The improving branch adds to improvingIssues (a Set, deduped) not issueScores. lastUpdated substituted with the deterministic clock date.
